task_completion.description: The agent executed the scart tool to organize the waveforms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window showing the execution of the 'scart' command (e.g., 'scart -I ~/Downloads/raw_dump...').

task_completion.description: The target root directory ShadowArchive was created in Documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window or terminal output showing the directory 'ShadowArchive' located inside '~/Documents'.

task_completion.description: The SDS year directory (2024) was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a directory named '2024' inside the 'ShadowArchive' directory, representing the first level of the SDS structure.

task_completion.description: The SDS network directory (GE) was created inside the year directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a directory named 'GE' inside the '2024' directory.

task_completion.description: The SDS station directories (GSI, SANI, BKB) were created inside the network directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for directories named 'GSI', 'SANI', and 'BKB' inside the 'GE' directory, confirming the miniSEED headers were correctly parsed and organized.

integrity.description: The agent used the scart tool rather than manually creating directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the terminal history shows the 'scart' command being executed to build the archive, rather than a series of manual 'mkdir' and 'mv' commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually archived the files and didn't just create an empty directory tree.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify through terminal output (like 'ls -l' or 'tree') or file manager views that the deepest directories contain actual waveform files, not just empty folders.

integrity.description: The agent processed the files from the correct source directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the 'scart' command or script explicitly references '~/Downloads/raw_dump/' as the input source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected root directory for the SDS archive is strictly '/home/ga/Documents/ShadowArchive'. The correct SDS structure must contain the year '2024', the network 'GE', and exactly 3 stations: 'GSI', 'SANI', and 'BKB'.
